name: rpc-hub
description: Blockchain full-chain RPC reverse proxy gateway for ZeroWallet

scripts.deploy:eth: CHAIN=ethereum dotenv -- npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler/eth.toml
scripts.deploy:bsc: CHAIN=bsc dotenv -- npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler/bsc.toml
scripts.deploy:sol: CHAIN=solana dotenv -- npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler/sol.toml
scripts.deploy:sui: CHAIN=sui dotenv -- npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler/sui.toml
scripts.deploy:apt: CHAIN=aptos dotenv -- npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler/apt.toml
